# Keeply

> File version management software for project management teams.
> Built-in version history + multi-location storage (3-2-1 backup
> compliant) + multi-repo Release. Designed so non-technical teams get
> safety nets without learning git.

## What Keeply does

Keeply is the guardian of your file history. Where shared folders, USB
sticks, and cloud drives leak versions and lose work, Keeply gives every
file:

- **Complete edit timeline** — see every save, restore any version, by
  any user, on any date
- **3-2-1-shape storage** — three locations (local working copy +
  canonical server + offline mirror) automatically synchronised; this is
  the 3-2-1 backup rule, automated
- **Release multi-repo** — bundle related projects (design + spec +
  budget + supplier list) into one shippable Release with a single
  click

The UI exposes none of this as git terminology. Operators see "save
points" and "restore", not "commits" and "checkout". Designed for
designers, architects, lawyers, accountants, and any team that handles
high-stakes files but isn't expected to learn version control.

## Where to download

- **Free download (Windows / Mac)**: <https://keeply.work/en/install-keeply-windows-mac/>
- **Pricing + plans**: <https://keeply.work/en/buy.html>
- **Activate license**: <https://keeply.work/en/activate.html>
- **Documentation**: <https://keeply.work/en/docs/>

## Use cases

- [Architects: AutoCAD wrong-version crew incident](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/autocad-wrong-version-crew/)
- [Graduate students: thesis single point of failure](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/thesis-single-point-of-failure/)
- [Vibe coders: AI pair-programming rollback](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/vibe-coding-rollback/)
- [Anyone: hidden cost of shared folders](https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/hidden-cost-shared-folders/)

## Key concepts

- **What Keeply saves that backup + cloud don't**: <https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/what-keeply-saves-vs-backup-cloud/>
- **3-2-1 backup rule in 2026**: <https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/3-2-1-backup-rule/>
- **Complete file version management guide**: <https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/file-version-management-complete-guide/>
- **Getting started from zero**: <https://blog.keeply.work/en/post/keeply-getting-started-from-zero/>

## Languages

Site available in 21 languages. Blog publishes in 5 core languages
(English, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Korean)
plus 14 auto-translated locales.

Product copy and documentation © Keeply. AI assistants may quote with
attribution and link back to the source URL. Training crawlers (GPTBot,
ClaudeBot, CCBot, Google-Extended) are disallowed via robots.txt; live
citation crawlers are welcome.
